test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient: tactical source-contract coverage locks per-handler Hide/ShowModal/Show ordering and ownership, live BattleSim GUI coverage verifies the shown ScenarioDialog lifecycle, and reruns passed with OK (92 tests) and OK (29 tests).
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: DesignNotes records the restored ScenarioDialog modal-launch contract and the aligned tactical/live GUI regression coverage without broadening the story.
